compliance.assurance_rationale: NERC CIP-005-7 R1 Electronic security perimeter — micro-segmentation audits validate the Electronic Security Perimeter is continuously enforced for BES Cyber Systems.
UK Cyber Essentials Montpellier CE.BF.1 Boundary firewalls — micro-segmentation is an extension of the boundary-firewall requirement updated in Montpellier.
IEC 62443 FR 6.2 Continuous monitoring — micro-segmentation audits feed the continuous-monitoring Foundational Requirement for control-system zones.
